titleStmt.title: SII 34.402: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 402. Aruppukkōṭṭai, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Sundarēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 5th year = A.D. 1221.

The oil-merchants (vāṇigar) of the bazaar Paḻivilaṅgi-perunderu in Iḍattuvaḷi, forming the ūrār of the place, decided to contribute oil, at the rate of one muṭṭai from each oil-mill each day, for three lamps in the temple of Kuṟaḷmāṇīśvaram-uḍaiyār at Iḍattuvaḷi in Cheṅgāṭṭirukkai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cOṇāṭu koṇ
ṭaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu ceṅkāṭṭirukkai Iṭattuva
ḷiyiṟp paḻivilaṅkip perunteruvil vāṇikar Ūrāyicainta vūrōmuṅ kāraṇavarōmu
mivvūr nāyaṉār kuṟaḷ māṇīśvaramuṭaiyār kōyiṟkaikkōḷariṟ kuḻaiñcāṉ piraḷaiya viṭaṅka
ṉāṉa Iṭattuvaḷi mārāyaṉukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkoṭutta nāḷvaḻi muṭṭaiyāvatu Eṅkaḷ cek
koṉṟi ṉāḷvaḻi yōreṇṇai muṭṭai cantirātittavarai celvatāka yivaṉukku nāṅkaḷ
viṟṟukkoṭukka Ivaṉiṉṉāyaṉār kōyilukku nittam mūṉṟu viḷakku Ivveṇṇai muṭ
ṭaiyoṉṟuṅ koṇṭu celuttuvatākak koṭuttamaiyi livaṉukkāka nāṅkaḷ nāḷ
vaḻi yeṇṇai muṭṭaiyoṉṟu muṭṭāmaṟ cantirātittavaṟ celuttuvōmāka camma
tittuk kallilē veṭṭik koṭuttōm paḻivilaṅkip perunteruvi lurāyicain
ta vūrōmuṅ kāraṇavarōmum ..
Digital edition of SII 34.402 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
